DP.466.0000:
Buck: Yo, if it isn’t [0103,0000]!\f
Don’t tell me you’re going to Stark
Mountain, too?\f
You’re pretty wimpy...
You’re sure you’re going to be OK?\f
Heh, why am I asking you that?
It’s not like I care.\f
Anyways, if we see each other on
Stark Mountain, the race is on to\r
see who gets the Magma Stone first!\f
DP.466.0001:
Wake: Oh, if it isn’t [0103,0000]!
It’s been a while!\f
You’ve grown so tough that you’re
training out here now...\f
Everyone keeps getting tougher and
tougher...\f
And, in doing that, they develop
closer bonds with their Pokémon...\f
DP.466.0002:
[0103,0001]: ...For someone born
overseas, that tough dude doesn’t\r
have an accent or anything.\f
DP.466.0003:
[0103,0000], there’s a volcano
ahead of us called Stark Mountain.\f
That blowhard Buck guy is on his way
there, as well.\f
I’m going to find the volcano’s
treasure before that guy does.\f
If I could do that, a 21-win streak
at the Battle Tower’d be possible!\f
DP.466.0004:
Wake: ...You’re serious?
You’re going to Stark Mountain?\f
Even the wild Pokémon there are
very, very tough...\f
If your Pokémon aren’t well trained,
they’ll have a miserable time...\f
Then again, that kind of challenge
is an exciting prospect...\f
But no matter what, you’d better
be fully prepared!\f
I’ve got to get ready for another
tournament. Farewell!\f
